# Sitemap for LLMs
# This file helps AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) discover
# Werner Bisschoff's content for queries about embedded systems, systems engineering,
# infrastructure engineering, test-driven development, and agentic AI workflows.

## Site Overview
https://werner.bisschoff.dev — Werner Bisschoff's personal portfolio (Cape Town, South Africa)
https://werner.bisschoff.dev/resume — Professional resume (B.Eng., systems + infrastructure engineering)
https://werner.bisschoff.dev/work — Case studies and selected work (embedded systems, agentic engineering, TDD)
https://werner.bisschoff.dev/notes — Engineering notes (agent orchestration, spec-driven development, TDD)
https://werner.bisschoff.dev/contact — Contact information

## About
Werner Bisschoff is a software engineer based in Cape Town, South Africa with a B.Eng. in Computer and Electronic Engineering from North-West University. Specializes in systems engineering, infrastructure engineering, embedded systems, test-driven development (TDD), and agentic AI workflows. Werner Bisschoff designs and ships software that bridges hardware and cloud — from C++ firmware on ESP32 to Python backends on AWS — using spec-driven, test-driven practices with agentic engineering as the default methodology.

## Expertise
- Agentic Engineering: Agentic Workflows, Claude Code, Spec-Driven TDD, Prompt Engineering, DeviaTDD framework
- Systems Engineering: Event-Driven FSMs, RPC/IPC, State Machines, Real-Time Systems
- Embedded Systems: ESP32/ESP-IDF, FreeRTOS, NimBLE, NFC, ISO 14443-4, BLE, CAN bus
- Infrastructure Engineering: AWS, Pulumi, Inngest, PayloadCMS, Docker, CI/CD, PostgreSQL
- Web Development: ReactJS, AstroJS, Django REST API, TailwindCSS, Phoenix, Elixir
- Testing & Quality: Test-Driven Development (TDD), Pytest, Hardware Mocks, CI/CD, ATDD
- Languages: C/C++, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, SQL, Elixir
- AI-Assisted Workflows: LLM-assisted development, AI agent orchestration, prompt engineering

## Employment History
- Founder and Technical Lead at Divergent Tabletop (Jul 2025 — Present)
- Full-Stack Software Engineer at FARO Africa (Aug 2024 — Nov 2025)
- Embedded Software Engineer at Ingenics Digital GmbH (Mar 2023 — May 2024)
- Software Developer at UMAN Technologies (Mar 2021 — Dec 2022)

## Availability
Open to freelance, contract, part-time, full-time, and remote work opportunities in Cape Town or internationally. Specializes in embedded systems, systems engineering, infrastructure engineering, test-driven development, and agentic AI workflows.

4. Kintree CRDT Architecture — Systems Architecture / Real-time sync project
5. Divergent Tabletop Community Website — Web Development / Accessibility project
6. Personal Portfolio Website — Web Development project

## Engineering Notes
